text:
Copperfield Foods — Our Team

Family-owned since 1987, now 140 people across three production sites.

Susan Vale — VP People
Susan leads people operations and is building out the company's first structured onboarding program.

Owen Hart, Chief Financial Officer
Owen manages finance and administrative systems.

Dev Kapoor - Head of IT
Dev runs infrastructure and systems for all three sites.

General inquiries: susan.vale@copperfieldfoods.com. Accounts payable: ohart@copperfieldfoods.com.
Copperfield Foods recently announced a fourth production site opening in Ohio next spring, adding roughly 60 new roles.
